Core.CollectErrors TYPE: bool VERSION: 2.0.0 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- Whether or not to collect errors found while filtering the document. This is a useful way to give feedback to your users. <strong>Warning:</strong> Currently this feature is very patchy and experimental, with lots of possible error messages not yet implemented. It will not cause any problems, but it may not help your users either. --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
